requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — DOSM Conformity and EDL / MEM Technical Review in Laos
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——老挝DOSM合格评定及EDL / 能源矿产部技术审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——寮國DOSM合格評定及EDL / 能源礦產部技術審查

summary.en: DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR) adopts IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) as the applicable safety standards for solar PV inverters in Laos. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory against IEC 62109-1/-2 is the expected conformity documentation for DOSM product review and EDL/MEM project technical review. IEC 62109-1 sets general safety requirements for all PV power converters; IEC 62109-2 adds inverter-specific requirements and cannot be assessed independently of Part 1. Project owners and procurement specifications for grid-connected solar PV in Laos — particularly utility-scale projects with international financing or EDL procurement — typically require IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates as a minimum safety evidence threshold.
summary.zh: DOSM（老挝标准计量局）采用IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）作为老挝太阳能光伏逆变器的适用安全标准。来自ILAC认可实验室、依据IEC 62109-1/-2的第三方型式试验证据是DOSM产品审查和EDL/MEM项目技术审查所期望的合格评定文件。IEC 62109-1规定所有光伏功率变换器的通用安全要求；IEC 62109-2增加了逆变器专项要求，不能独立于第1部分进行评估。老挝并网太阳能光伏项目的项目业主和采购规格——特别是具有国际融资或EDL采购的公用事业规模项目——通常要求IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书作为最低安全证据门槛。
summary.zht: DOSM（寮國標準計量局）採用IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）作為寮國太陽能光伏逆變器的適用安全標準。來自ILAC認可實驗室、依據IEC 62109-1/-2的第三方型式試驗證據是DOSM產品審查和EDL/MEM項目技術審查所期望的合格評定文件。IEC 62109-1規定所有光伏功率轉換器的通用安全要求；IEC 62109-2增加了逆變器專項要求，不能獨立於第1部分進行評估。寮國併網太陽能光伏項目的項目業主和採購規格——特別是具有國際融資或EDL採購的公用事業規模項目——通常要求IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書作為最低安全證據門檻。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted by DOSM Laos; referenced in EDL/MEM technical review for grid-connected PV)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard; implicitly applicable whenever IEC 62109-2 is assessed)
DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR) — conformity assessment framework for regulated electrical products including PV inverters

summary.en: China's primary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a China domestic standard assessed at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) and CGC (China General Certification Centre) offer voluntary PV inverter certification based on GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004. While GB/T 37408 shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2, it is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by DOSM or Laos EDL/MEM project technical review as equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence. This gap applies even where the same Chinese-brand inverter has already been deployed in other Laos BRI projects — each project and each product conformity submission is assessed on its documentation.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全的主要标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内标准。CQC（中国质量认证中心）和CGC（中国质量认证中心）基于GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004提供自愿性光伏逆变器认证。尽管GB/T 37408在安全意图上与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被DOSM或老挝EDL/MEM项目技术审查接受为IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据的等效依据。即使相同中国品牌逆变器已在其他老挝"一带一路"项目中部署，上述差距仍然适用——每个项目和每次产品合格评定提交均依据其文件进行评估。
summary.zht: 中國光伏並網逆變器安全的主要標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內標準。CQC（中國質量認證中心）和CGC（中國質量認證中心）基於GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004提供自願性光伏逆變器認證。儘管GB/T 37408在安全意圖上與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被DOSM或寮國EDL/MEM項目技術審查接受為IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據的等效依據。即使相同中國品牌逆變器已在其他寮國「一帶一路」項目中部署，上述差距仍然適用——每個項目和每次產品合格評定提交均依據其文件進行評估。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC/CGC voluntary PV inverter certification — China domestic voluntary schemes based on GB/T 37408; not accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 equivalent in Laos

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy DOSM Laos IEC 62109-2 type-test requirement or the safety evidence expectation of EDL/MEM project technical review. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to the Laos project. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for DOSM conformity review, MEM project licensing, or EDL technical review. Note that IEC 62109-1 (2010) has been in force for over a decade and major Chinese inverter manufacturers already hold IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates from international test laboratories (TÜV, Bureau Veritas, Intertek, etc.) — confirm the certificate covers the specific model and power rating being supplied to Laos.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足老挝DOSM的IEC 62109-2型式试验要求，也不满足EDL/MEM项目技术审查对安全证据的期望。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至老挝项目的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在提交DOSM合格评定审查、能源矿产部项目许可或EDL技术审查所需设备文件前，应补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。注意：IEC 62109-1（2010年）已实施逾十年，主要中国逆变器制造商已从国际测试实验室（TÜV、必维国际检验集团、英泰克等）取得IEC 62109-1/-2证书——须确认证书覆盖供应至老挝的特定型号和功率等级。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足寮國DOSM的IEC 62109-2型式試驗要求，也不滿足EDL/MEM項目技術審查對安全證據的期望。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至寮國項目的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在提交DOSM合格評定審查、能源礦產部項目許可或EDL技術審查所需設備文件前，應補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。注意：IEC 62109-1（2010年）已實施逾十年，主要中國逆變器製造商已從國際測試實驗室（TÜV、必維國際檢驗集團、英泰克等）取得IEC 62109-1/-2證書——須確認證書覆蓋供應至寮國的特定型號和功率等級。

mandatory_status.target: Required for DOSM conformity assessment of PV inverters as regulated electrical products in Laos; IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence is expected by EDL and MEM in project technical review and is a procurement baseline for utility-scale and internationally financed projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification is available but not required under Chinese law for domestic market PV inverters

source.publisher: DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology), Ministry of Industry and Commerce, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy DOSM Laos IEC 62109-1/-2 conformity requirements or EDL/MEM project safety evidence expectations. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory — many major Chinese inverter manufacturers already hold such certificates, so first confirm whether an existing certificate covers the specific model and power rating to be supplied to Laos before commissioning new testing. Verify current DOSM regulated-product scope and applicable IEC standard editions with DOSM directly before shipment, as Laos regulatory capacity and product-scope determinations continue to develop.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足老挝DOSM的IEC 62109-1/-2合格评定要求或EDL/MEM项目安全证据期望。请安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验——许多主要中国逆变器制造商已持有此类证书，因此在委托新测试前，首先确认现有证书是否涵盖供应至老挝的特定型号和功率等级。在出货前直接向DOSM核实现行受监管产品范围和适用IEC标准版本，因为老挝监管能力和产品范围认定仍在持续发展。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足寮國DOSM的IEC 62109-1/-2合格評定要求或EDL/MEM項目安全證據期望。請安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗——許多主要中國逆變器製造商已持有此類證書，因此在委託新測試前，首先確認現有證書是否涵蓋供應至寮國的特定型號和功率等級。在出貨前直接向DOSM核實現行受監管產品範圍和適用IEC標準版本，因為寮國監管能力和產品範圍認定仍在持續發展。
